aeo_readiness.summary: Tip Top HVAC is not currently optimized for AI search, making it unlikely that AI assistants will cite or recommend them. Their lack of schema markup and conversational content significantly limits their AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with structured data about the business.
Create an FAQ page with questions and answers relevant to HVAC services to address common customer queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer questions in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for explaining HVAC services
No Product schema for specific HVAC units

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Bellevue, WA, where AI assistants prioritize more AI-optimized competitors.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI with the structured data it needs for citations.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning Tip Top HVAC as a local HVAC authority by creating detailed, expert-backed content and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Tip Top HVAC the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Tip Top HVAC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The site lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, creates FAQ content, and enhances GBP engagement to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Tip Top HVAC.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months of implementation.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, making it critical to act now to avoid losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Tip Top HVAC - Act Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified critical gaps in AI optimization that are limiting your visibility to AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
